getInvolved.title: Get Involved
getInvolved.hero: Your participation can transform Nepal. Join thousands of committed individuals working towards a progressive, corruption-free nation.
getInvolved.waysDesc: Choose how you want to contribute to building a better Nepal
getInvolved.volunteerDesc: Join our dedicated team of volunteers and be the change you want to see in Nepal.
getInvolved.flexibleCommitmentDesc: Choose activities that fit your schedule
getInvolved.skillDevelopmentDesc: Gain valuable experience in community organizing
getInvolved.makeRealImpactDesc: See the direct results of your contributions
getInvolved.trainingProvidedDesc: We'll equip you with everything you need
getInvolved.joinRSP: Join PNSB-Norway today and be part of Nepal's transformation story
getInvolved.communityOrganizerDesc: Lead local initiatives and bring Nepalis together in your city
getInvolved.digitalActivistDesc: Amplify our message through social media and online campaigns
getInvolved.policyContributorDesc: Help shape RSP's policies and strategic direction
getInvolved.fundraisingTeamDesc: Support our mission through creative fundraising initiatives
getInvolved.youthAmbassadorDesc: Engage young Nepalis and drive youth participation
getInvolved.creativeTeamDesc: Design visual content and creative materials
getInvolved.testimonial1: Being part of PNSB-Norway has given me a platform to contribute meaningfully to Nepal's future while staying connected to my roots.
getInvolved.testimonial2: The energy and commitment of RSP members inspire me every day. Together, we're creating real change for Nepal.
getInvolved.testimonial3: RSP gives me the opportunity to use my skills for something bigger than myself. It's about building the Nepal we all dream of.
getInvolved.testimonial4: The energy and commitment of RSP members inspires me every day. Together, we are bringing real change for Nepal.
getInvolved.thankYou: Thank you for your interest! We will contact you soon.

about-us.title: About Us
about-us.subtitle: Learn more about our organization and mission
about-us.about_description_1: Prawas Nepali Samparka Bibhag, Norway is a non-profit organization established in 2025 to bring together Nepalese people living in Norway. We are a community built on the values of brotherhood, mutual support, and cultural pride.
about-us.about_description_2: Living far from home can be challenging, but together we create a home away from home. Our organization serves as a bridge - connecting our members to their Nepalese roots while helping them integrate and thrive in Norwegian society. We celebrate our rich cultural heritage through festivals, programs, and traditions, while also embracing the opportunities and values that Norway offers.
about-us.about_description_3: We believe in the power of community. Whether it's celebrating Dashain together, supporting a family in need, or sharing knowledge between our two cultures, we stand united. Our members come from different backgrounds and regions of Nepal, but we are bound by a common goal: to preserve our identity, support one another, and contribute positively to both Nepalese and Norwegian societies.
about-us.mission_description: Our mission is to unite and empower the Nepalese community in Norway.
about-us.vision_description: A thriving, connected Nepalese community in Norway where every member feels supported, valued, and proud of their heritage - while contributing as active, integrated members of Norwegian society.

about.title: Welcome to PNSB-Norway
about.description: PNSB-Norway is dedicated to empowering the Nepali community residing in Norway socially, culturally, and educationally. We are committed to providing our members with support, guidance, and opportunities to help them reach their full potential.
about.mission_description: Building a strong, united community that celebrates democratic values and supports every Nepali's journey in Norway.
about.value_cultural_preservation_desc: Preserving our heritage by celebrating Nepalese festivals and promoting our language, culture, religion, traditions, norms, and values for current and future generations.
about.value_community_brotherhood_desc: Building a supportive network where community members help each other through life’s challenges and celebrate successes together.
about.value_social_integration_desc: Encouraging meaningful participation in Norwegian society while maintaining strong connections to our Nepalese identity.
about.value_humanitarian_support_desc: Providing financial assistance and community aid during emergencies, natural disasters, and times of need, both in Norway and in Nepal.
about.value_knowledge_exchange_desc: Sharing knowledge, experiences, and positive aspects of Norwegian society with our community and with people in Nepal for mutual growth and understanding.
about.cta_member_desc: Join our community and make your voice heard.
about.cta_donate_desc: Your contribution helps us create lasting impact.
about.cta_involved_desc: Volunteer and be part of the change you want to see.

membership.title: Membership Form
membership.subtitle: Your voice matters in shaping future of our nation. Fill out the information below to become a member of PNSB-Norway and be part of the movement to build a progressive, corruption-free Nepal.
membership.success: Thank you for applying! We will review your application and get back to you soon.

membership.general_member_desc: For individuals who support PNSB-Norway's mission and want to stay informed.
membership.executive_member_desc: For those who wish to take an executive role in PNSB-Norway's initiatives and events.

membership.permission_email: I consent to having my email address published publicly on the website.

donate.hero_description: Your generous contribution helps us make a positive impact in the Nepali community in Norway and support democratic values in Nepal.
donate.community_events_desc: Support cultural programs and community gatherings
donate.organizational_growth_desc: Expand our reach and strengthen our movement
donate.member_support_desc: Resources and assistance for our members
donate.why_donate_1: 100% of donations go directly to our programs
donate.faq_1_answer: Yes, all payments are processed securely through Stripe, a trusted payment platform used by millions worldwide.
donate.faq_2_answer: Yes, you will receive an email receipt immediately after your donation is processed.
donate.faq_3_answer: Yes, you can choose to make your donation anonymous by checking the anonymous option in the form.
donate.faq_4_question: How will my donation be used?
donate.faq_4_answer: Your donation supports community events, political advocacy, organizational operations, and member services.
